description: Checkout counts for all courses with active reserves, scoped to a single quarter. Provide either a term name (resolved to dates automatically) or explicit start/end dates. No course filter; no historical toggle — always shows current reserves only.

parameters.name: term_name
parameters.displayName: Term name (exact match, e.g. Spring 2025) — takes priority over date range if provided

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.displayName: Quarter start date (used only if Term Name is blank)

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.displayName: Quarter end date (used only if Term Name is blank)

parameters.name: exclusions
parameters.displayName: Exclude course types — comma-separated flags [POP, LAW, NEW, EMPTY]
